name: Ameris Capital Administradora General De Fondos S.A. - Ameris Dva Silicon Fund Fondo De Inversion
summary: Ameris Capital Administradora General De Fondos S.A. - Ameris Dva Silicon Fund Fondo De Inversion is an investment fund focused on the Silicon Valley region. It is managed by Ameris Capital Administradora General De Fondos S.A. and aims to generate returns through investments in companies related to technology and innovation.
